primary_detection.name: Multi-Layer Encoding Obfuscation
primary_detection.description: Detected nested encoding requiring multiple decode passes to reveal malicious payload

underlying_threats.name: Backdoor Installation
underlying_threats.description: Downloads, makes executable, and runs persistent backdoor

underlying_threats.name: Persistence Mechanism
underlying_threats.description: Installs executable in /tmp for repeated execution

underlying_threats.name: Detection Evasion
underlying_threats.description: Multiple encoding layers designed to evade static analysis

patterns: Five-layer nesting (hex -> base64 -> rot13 -> hex -> base64)
Self-describing encoded payload with layer metadata
obfuscation_technique.decode_complexity: Requires sequential decoding of all layers

evasion_characteristics.static_analysis_evasion: High - multiple encoding passes hide all malicious patterns
evasion_characteristics.signature_evasion: High - no recognizable strings in encoded form
evasion_characteristics.behavioral_indicators: Medium - decode operations may trigger heuristic detection
evasion_characteristics.decode_automation: Can include self-describing layer information for automated decoding

reasoning: Advanced multi-layer encoding using up to 5 nested encoding schemes (base64, hex, rot13) specifically designed to evade static analysis. The complexity of the encoding demonstrates deliberate evasion intent. Final payload installs a persistent backdoor with remote code execution capability.
